description: Breakcold is a sales CRM for email and LinkedIn power users, with a unified social inbox, social listening, and AI that moves leads through the pipeline.
tagline: Sales CRM for email and LinkedIn
overview: Breakcold is an AI-native sales CRM that centralizes email, LinkedIn, and messaging in one inbox, with social listening and AI agents that advance leads and create tasks.
what_is: Breakcold is a sales CRM built for people who sell across email and social. AI agents move leads through pipelines and create tasks automatically, so reps spend less time on data entry and more on closing.

It is strongest at managing leads across channels like email, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, and Telegram from one inbox, which suits agencies, startups, consultants, and small businesses. Automated pipelines and tasks mean results show up within days.

Breakcold integrates with LinkedIn, Zapier, and other tools to enrich CRM data and support multi-platform communication. It is a focused sales CRM rather than an ERP or full marketing-automation platform.
